📝 Mayor's Blog Update (Published: June 12, 2026)

On Friday, June 12, children and staff from Sayuri Recognized Kindergarten (認定こども園さゆり幼稚園) visited to mark Flower Day, a Christian observance.

Thank you to all the children and staff for the heartfelt message cards and beautiful flowers.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202606/13749.html
summary: 📝 Mayor's Blog: Flower Day Visit from Sayuri Kindergarten
